content: Preview proxy (/preview/:runId) intercepts ALL requests including /api/assets/* and forwards them to the workspace app. The workspace app has no /api/assets route — this causes 404. Fix applied in server/index.js: early return at top of preview proxy middleware that short-circuits /api/assets/* back to the ForgeOS root handler via app._router.handle(). Without this, no generated app can fetch global assets from the frontend.

Generated apps should fetch global assets client-side using root-relative /api/assets/FILENAME — not server-side via localhost. The preview proxy now passes /api/assets/* through to the ForgeOS asset handler correctly. Server-side asset fetches via localhost are unnecessary and fragile.
